results.description: Remove the banner MUST line — B-01 must catch its absence.
Invert the tool contract: tell the agent to hand-write scaffolding instead of running init — B-03/B-05 must catch.
Remove the no-preamble/no-narration rule — does anything fail, or is it decorative? (B-02 probe)
Remove the seal-staleness workflow rule — B-07/B-08 must catch the agent no longer checking the seal.

note: target ≥0.9 on critical mutations before trusting the suite (P5); decorative candidates are token-cut / rewrite candidates
